titles.en: Chapter on Performing sa'i While Riding and Sitting Between Safa and Marwah
Chapter on Performing sa'i While Riding and Sitting Between Safa and Marwah

segments: : قُلْتُ لَهُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ تَسْعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ عَلَى دَابَّةٍ أَوْ عَلَى بَعِيرٍ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ» قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَفْعَلُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ وَ اَلْمَشْيُ أَفْضَلُ.
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ تَسْعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ عَلَى دَابَّةٍ أَوْ عَلَى بَعِيرٍ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ» قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَفْعَلُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ وَ اَلْمَشْيُ أَفْضَلُ.

segments:
Hadith.2851 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) saying: I asked him about a woman performing Sa'i (running between Safa and Marwah) on a mount or a camel.
Imam (as) said: "There is no problem with that."
I also asked him about a man doing the same,
Imam (as) said: "There is no problem with it, but walking is better."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2851 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) saying: I asked him about a woman performing Sa'i (running between Safa and Marwah) on a mount or a camel.
Imam (as) said: "There is no problem with that."
I also asked him about a man doing the same,
Imam (as) said: "There is no problem with it, but walking is better."

narratorChain.raw: 2851 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Performing sa'i While Riding and Sitting Between Safa and Marwah

segments:
Hadith.2852 - Abdul Rahman ibn Al-Hajjaj asked Abu Ibrahim (as) about women performing the Sa'i (ritual walking) between Safa and Marwah on camels or other riding animals: "Is it sufficient for them to stand beneath Safa and Marwah at a point where they can see the Ka'bah?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2852 - Abdul Rahman ibn Al-Hajjaj asked Abu Ibrahim (as) about women performing the Sa'i (ritual walking) between Safa and Marwah on camels or other riding animals: "Is it sufficient for them to stand beneath Safa and Marwah at a point where they can see the Ka'bah?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."

narratorChain.raw: 2852 - وَ سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلنِّسَاءِ يَطُفْنَ عَلَى اَلْإِبِلِ وَ اَلدَّوَابِّ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ أَ يُجْزِيهِنَّ أَنْ يَقِفْنَ تَحْتَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ حَيْثُ يَرَيْنَ اَلْبَيْتَ فَقَالَ

parts.text: سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :
اَلْمَرْوَةِ أَ يُجْزِيهِنَّ أَنْ يَقِفْنَ تَحْتَ اَلصَّفَا

titles.en: Chapter on Performing sa'i While Riding and Sitting Between Safa and Marwah

segments: : «لَيْسَ عَلَى اَلرَّاكِبِ سَعْيٌ وَ لَكِنْ لِيُسْرِعْ شَيْئاً ».
arabic.text: : «لَيْسَ عَلَى اَلرَّاكِبِ سَعْيٌ وَ لَكِنْ لِيُسْرِعْ شَيْئاً ».

segments: Hadith.2853 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: "There is no Sa'i (ritual walking) for the one who is riding, but they should increase their speed slightly."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2853 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: "There is no Sa'i (ritual walking) for the one who is riding, but they should increase their speed slightly."

narratorChain.raw: 2853 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Performing sa'i While Riding and Sitting Between Safa and Marwah

segments: : «لاَ تَجْلِسْ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ إِلاَّ مِنْ جَهْدٍ.
arabic.text: : «لاَ تَجْلِسْ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ إِلاَّ مِنْ جَهْدٍ.

segments: Hadith.2854 - Abdul Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah narrated from Imam (as) who said: "Do not sit between Safa and Marwah except out of necessity."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2854 - Abdul Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah narrated from Imam (as) who said: "Do not sit between Safa and Marwah except out of necessity."

narratorChain.raw: 2854 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ قَالَ

parts.text: 2854 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ قَالَ
